title: Pre-Arrival Guest Welcome Email Template
subject_template: Welcome to {{hotel_name}} - Your Upcoming Stay Details
body_template:
Dear {{guest_name}},

We are delighted to welcome you to {{hotel_name}} for your upcoming stay from {{check_in_date}} to {{check_out_date}}. Our team is dedicated to ensuring you have a memorable experience.

Your reservation details are as follows:

  • Room Type: {{room_type}}
  • Number of Guests: {{guest_count}}
  • Reservation Number: {{reservation_number}}

To enhance your stay, we offer a variety of services including:

  • Complimentary airport transfer - please provide your flight details if required.
  • Concierge services for personalized recommendations and bookings.
  • Access to our exclusive F&B outlets offering a range of international cuisines.

Should you have any special requests or require assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us at {{hotel_contact_email}} or {{hotel_contact_phone}}.

We look forward to welcoming you soon.

Warm regards,

{{hotel_name}} Team

variables.name: hotel_contact_phone
variables.description: Contact phone number for the hotel
